feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: MSSQL DB restore for PO
entry.content:
Hi Team,
 
We have two PO systems running the same version of SAP NetWeaver 7.5 on Azure with an MSSQL database:
 
- PO 1 - BPI
- PO 2 - BPO
 
We are planning to restore the DB backup of the BPI system onto the BPO system. If we proceed with this restoration, considering both systems are on NetWeaver 7.5, are there any potential configuration issues that might arise on the BPO system?

 

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Software license is about to expire in development environment
entry.content:
Hello good morning

Can you help me create a case since when I want to edit the detailed description it does not allow me to edit, please help.

Thank you

entry.title: System Migration - Oracle 12.2 to Orqcel 19c
entry.content:
hello Team,

we are migrating from Vendor DC to Azure. 

Source - Windows 2012R2/Oracle 12.2
Target - Windows 2022 / Oracle 19.c

Option 1-
Install Oracle 12.2 on Windows 2022, take a rman online backup from source and restore on target. Upgrade target Oracle from 12.2. to 19c before releasing the system to users.

Option 2 :- 
Install Windows 2012/Oracle 12.2 and then in-place upgrade to Windows 2022/Oracle 19c.

Question is which option is supported by SAP . 
for QA system we performed export/import using SWPM.
we considering above options as SWPM exp/imp is taking longer duration and as its critical system business is not allowing longer downtime.

Also, can you please share the archive link for Oracle 12.2 version...

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Downloading netweaver rfc sdk
entry.content:
Hi 

I am trying to download the ODBC driver or netweaver rfc sdk for developing but seems I have to be S-User and I am now P-user now, is there any way to download them without that much of complexity

entry.title: [P00] NFS Service について
entry.content:
先日、本番稼働中のシステムにおいて、NFSマウントしているディレクトリが消失したたため、
ジョブが実行できないという障害が発生しました。
原因については、HEC様のオペレーションミスとの報告がありました。
現時点では障害は復旧しておりますが、今後の対応として、NFSサービスの稼働監視とディレクトリ監視を実施していきたいと
検討しております。

システムは、APサーバが2台構成となっております。
SAP ABAPシステム用の標準SAP ディレクトリ構成として、/sapmnt, /usr/sap/trans のディレクトリに関しては、
AP1号機側からのNFSマウントにて、共有されているとの理解です。
この場合、AP1号機は、NFSサーバとなり、AP2号機は、NFSクライアントとなる理解です。
NFSを利用する場合において、NFSサーバ側(AP1号機)、NFSクライン後側(AP2号機)、それぞれで、稼働が必要なサービスについて
ご教授お願いします。NFSサーバ側(AP1号機)とNFSクライン後側(AP2号機)では、必要なサービスはそれぞれ異なるという理解です。
稼働が必要なサービスを特定し、そのサービスに異常が発生した時に監視できることを考えております。

NFSについては、バージョン3 が利用されているとの理解しております。
バージョン４とバージョン３にて、利用されるサービスが異なる場合については、それぞれで必要となるサービスについて教えて下さい。
NFSサービスを利用するにあたり、必要なサービスについて説明等されている文章やナレッジがありましたら、案内いただけますと助かります。


宜しくお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Dependency of SAP GUI 8.0 on SAP BASIS version
entry.content:
Is SAP GUI 800 compatible with Windows 11 and SAP basis 701?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: [Inquiry] Deletion of user SAPSR3DB
entry.content:
We are planning to delete the SAPSR3DB in the ABAP system (dual stack). DB team confirmed that the SAPSR3DB doesn't own any table in XI2. Just wanna confirm if it is fine if we proceed with the deletion of the user. Will it not affect the other tables or the XI4 (Java) tables?

Regards,

PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Missing Privileg to create User with Password * in Netweaver 7.5 on MaxDB
entry.content:
Hello,

in the Moment, i am trying to install a Netweaver AS Java System on a MaxDB in Windows 11. I already reinstalled the Server, but there is the same Mistake every Time. As you can see in the Image, the Problem is the Creation of the SAPMDADB user (SAP SID is MDA), with the Password "*". Interestingly, when i try to do it with the DBADMIN in the MaxDB Studio, than it do not work either. If i change the Password to [for example] Abcd0123 it has no Problem. Do i have to change the Password Policy or what can i change?

It is a Test System and our only one running Windows because we only need to test Scripts, i can change everything possible. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Changelog deletion with Process chain does not work
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

We have a Process chain running which should delete all changelogs older then 30 Days from differenz aDSOs. But as you can see on the Screenshot, the Cleanup failed and nothing is deleted.

Screenshot of RSMNG request list:

Screenshot of aDSO Administration:

 

Can anybody help?

entry.title: SAP GUI JRE Compatibility
entry.content:
HI Team 

We are using  SAP GUI for Windows on the end-user side. All our users are reaching to SAP systems (ECC,BW, BI,SCM,PM,HR,S4).
We have Win shuttle, Prometheus, Ariba and SAP PO, and Analysis for Office in our landscape 
We have JAVA 8 Update 301 However Oracle announced the engine will require a license in the future. hence infrastructure is planning to remove the licensed version of JAVA from our end user. Can we get a compatible version of JAVA requirements For SAP that SAP GUI 770 and SAP GUI 800?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue in PO while sending the data to JDBC postgreSQl DB
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Scenario: Proxy(SOAP) -JDBC(PostgreSQL)

When we are sending the data from SAP ==>SAP PO==> JDBC (PostgreSQL) but its failing in PO

Getting an error as below.

Unable to execute statement for table or stored procedure. ‘Offices’ (Structure ’Statement’) due to org.postgresql.util.PSQLException:ERROR: relation “offices” does not exist

Position: 8

So can you please help us how to send data to PostgreSQL from SAP PO?

Thanks,

Vidya.

entry.title: SAP on Oracle RAC
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

we want to implement an SAP system on Oracle RAC with ASM on standard VMs, we have two questions.
1)In SAP note DIGITS it is reported that the Oracle RDBMS Home must be a shared file system. In our opinion this leads several limitations, including for example the impossibility of performing DB rolling Upgrades and Patches. 

Is this limitation still valid or we can implement local Oracle RDBMS Home for each node of the Oracle RAC Cluster? We are asking you because the SAP note DIGITS is not updated since DIGITS.

For "Oracle Engineered Systems" solutions this limitation does not seem to apply.

Is there any way to perform patches in rolling mode for the RDBMS Home on Oracle RAC for SAP?

2)In a RAC implementation the grid infrastructure software should be installed manually following Oracle Guides or using SAP tools or scripts provided by SAP? 

Thank you and best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Need Clarification on SAP GUI Version
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

We would like to know what is the current SAP GUI version which SAP is having, for BSC currently we are using Version 740, we would like to know when SAP will be stop supporting this version.

If BSC would like to move to latest version which we are assuming 800, what would be the impact, does we need to perform any test in existing system once we migrated, and during migration to latest version does there will be any downtime.

Currently version 740 we see it was user friendly, does we will have same kind of look and feel and user friendly.

Please answer to above queries,, these we need to update to client.

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: File stored in Ready Folder is not processing
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have an issue with LDAP authentication in MDM 7.1 initiation (.INI) File.

Log Detail
Log-on failure: LDAP Error, userName = Admin User not found

We are trying to replace the existing system ID with a different user.

1. Do we need to encrypt the password in the initiation file, Can We set-up the password attribute directly (without encryption).

2. What encryption method is being used between MDM7.1 and LDAP?

Thanks

entry.title: Minimum required SAP Kernel Patchlevel for SLES 15 (SP 6)
entry.content:
Dear community,

for AIX 7.3 I found a nice list of minimum required SAP Kernel patchlevels in SAP note 1780629. Now I'm looking for something similar for SLES 15 (SP6). I already know the PAM information, but that's quite basic. I know the SAP notes 2369910 and 2578899 as well - but they don't give information about SAP Kernel PLs...

Is there any SAP note or the like which could provide such information for SLES 15 (SP6)?

Thanks & regards, Marie

entry.title: Password policy update on SAP netweaver
entry.content:
Hi all, anyone could answer this. If I apply a new password policy in SAP NetWeaver such as the minimum password length, expiration time, password history size, and maximum idle time, it will have affect in any integrated systems users like those using the CUST_USER_ADMIN_ROLE that access the HANA database, etc?

Does it force to update their own password?

Thank you,

Best regards,

-Jaspher

entry.title: SAP PI NW7.5 upgrade and split (ctc wizards for PI split)
entry.content:
Hi,

We performed upgrade of SAP dual stack PI NW 7.40 to SAP PI NW 7.5 followed by Split procedure.

We followed upgrade guide, see attached, page 62, 

f the former SAP PI system is a dual-stack implementa­tion, you must carry out after the upgrade of SAP PI to SAP NetWeaver 7.5 the dual-stack-split using the soft­ware provisioning manager for the dual stack-split pro­cedure and the PI Upgrade CTC Wizard for the configu­ration adjustment.

1 - upgrade

2 - split

3 - trying to run PI Upgrade EHP Wizard and it failing.

SAP note DIGITS , see attached, have different sequence: Upgrade, Wizard, Split.

So, 2 documents have different information.

Since Upgrade and split is already done, we are seeking your help on completing PI Upgrade EHP Wizard.

According to the note below, the Wizard cannot be run after split.

Kind regards,

PERSON_NAME.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Want to know how to implement password management od SAPSR3 user
entry.content:
Business wants password policy for expiry, invalid attempts etc. to be implemented for all db users, including db default & SAPSR3 schema user. How to do and what is the impact.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.content:

We are trying to establish file transfer from SAP ECC to S3 bucket using AWS SDK.
Kindly help to suggest the prerequisites and setup procedure for the same.

Regards,

entry.title: How to make a CFL based field non-editable in SAP GUI transaction ?
entry.content:
I am trying to add a field to Business Context PS_PROJECT using Custom Fields App.

I am able to add the field and enable it on Project Definition tcodes ( CJ01/02/03 )

Having said that the field is editable by default. Now i have a required to make this field non-editable. Key point here is this field is on a SAP-GUI transaction and not out of the box Fiori app

How can this be achieved ?
